failedAssertions.reason: Merge coordination UI (conflict indicators, merge lock status, merge blocking reasons) not yet built in Autopilot tab. Delivery Runs section shows only 'Status: pending' without any merge-related status. Backend features exist (acquire-product-lock, release-product-lock, check-merge-conflict) but no UI surface shows merge conflict indicators, merge lock status, or merge blocking reasons.

frictions.description: Add Note and Inspect Linked Issue buttons appear disabled when no active run is present - expected behavior but not clearly indicated in UI
frictions.resolution: UI behavior appears reasonable - intervention controls likely disabled when no active run is present. Consider adding tooltip or helper text explaining disabled state.
